rationale: The proposed $140,000 exemption matches the constitutional amount in art. VIII, §1-b(c). No conflict; the amendment conforms the statute to the constitutional ceiling.
quote: The amount of $140,000 of the market value of the residence homestead of a married or unmarried adult, including one living alone, is exempt from ad valorem taxation for general elementary and secondary public school purposes.
_note: Proposed change aligns statute with existing constitutional provision; no conflict detected.
